caption: The video features an elderly man with gray hair tied back, wearing glasses and a traditional-style shirt adorned with eagle motifs and colorful stripes. He is standing at a podium, speaking into a microphone. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden paneling in the background. The man seems to be addressing an audience, possibly during a formal event or presentation. His expression and posture suggest he is engaged in delivering his speech, and the logo "ORCA" in the corner indicates that this might be related to an organization or event associated with that name. The scene conveys a sense of respect and formality, as the man appears to be sharing important information or insights.
